Container.Name: beam
Container.Overview:
Beam is a self-hosted, lightweight file-sharing portal built in Rust with Yew and Axum.
Key Features: - Smooth drag-and-drop uploads for both files and directories. - Dynamic customizable file retention and total storage quotas. - Security locking using an access PIN. - Optional allowed file extensions filter.
Container.Requires: Ensure the App Data volume has sufficient disk space for files uploaded under the uploads directory. Note: The container runs as nobody:users (UID 99 / GID 100) out of the box. Ensure the mapped host appdata folder has read/write permissions for UID 99 / GID 100.

Config.Name: WebUI Port
Config.Description: The host port mapped to the web server (default container port: 4401).

Config.Name: Access PIN
Config.Description: Optional numerical PIN to lock access to the interface. (Optional, not required. Leave empty for unlocked public mode.)

Config.Name: Max Connection Attempts
Config.Description: Number of failed PIN attempts permitted before locking out the user client IP address.

Config.Name: Site Title
Config.Description: Custom website title rendered in the navigation header or browser tab.

Config.Name: Base URL
Config.Description: Application base URL. Highly recommended to set if using a reverse proxy to ensure redirect and socket links are generated correctly.

Config.Name: Allowed Origins
Config.Description: Comma-separated list of allowed HTTP request origins (CORS filter). Use '*' to allow all origins.

Config.Name: App Data
Config.Description: Persistent storage for database and config files.

Config.Name: Upload Directory (Internal)
Config.Description: Internal container path where uploads are saved. Do not change this to a host/share path (e.g., /mnt/user/...); it must remain an internal path (default: /app/data/uploads).

Config.Name: Max File Size
Config.Description: Maximum allowed single file upload size (in GB).

Config.Name: Max Storage Limit
Config.Description: Combined maximum total storage limit for all uploaded files (in GB).

Config.Name: Retention Period Days
Config.Description: Number of days to store uploaded files before automatically purging them.

Config.Name: Allowed Extensions
Config.Description: Comma-separated list of allowed file extensions (e.g. pdf,png,zip). Leave empty to allow all.

Config.Name: Enable Translation Selector
Config.Description: Enable the multi-language / translation selector in the navigation header (true/false). Defaults to false.

Config.Name: Enable Themes Toggle
Config.Description: Enable the Super Metroid theme selector in the navigation header (true/false). Defaults to true.

Config.Name: Enable Print Button
Config.Description: Enable the print button in the navigation header (true/false). Defaults to false.

Config.Name: Show Version Number
Config.Description: Display the application version number in the footer (true/false). Defaults to true.

Config.Name: Show GitHub Link
Config.Description: Display a link to the GitHub profile in the footer (true/false). Defaults to true.
